name: Veal Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the veal until thin.
2. Pat the veal dry and cut into pieces.
3. Combine bread crumbs, cheese, spices, and salt in a separate bowl.
4. In a shallow dish, beat the eggs.
5. Dip each piece of veal first in the beaten eggs, then coat with the breadcrumb mixture on both sides.
6. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
7. Sauté the veal until golden brown, about 3 minutes per side. Remove to a warm platter.
8. Drain any excess fat from the skillet.
9. Stir in white wine and scrape up any brown residue from the bottom of the pan until boiling.
10. Pour the wine mixture over the veal.
11. Serve with tomato sauce and top with mozzarella cheese slices. Broil until the cheese melts.
